items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the OAuth consent screen clarity, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific checks or outcomes related to the OAuth consent screen, leading to an inconclusive verdict. Without concrete evidence or assertions confirming the expected behavior, the requirement remains unverified.
